name: Mock Bank
description: Reference plugin simulating a bank portal for development and testing
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

name: Mizrahi-Tefahot Bank
description: Connector for Mizrahi-Tefahot Bank (מזרחי-טפחות) — Israel's third-largest bank. Extracts transactions and annual tax documents.
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

name: Menora Mivtachim Pension
description: Connector for Menora Mivtachim (מנורה מבטחים) — pension fund, provident fund, and study fund statements and annual tax documents.
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

name: Harel Pension
description: Connector for Harel Insurance & Finance (הראל ביטוח ופיננסים) — pension fund, provident fund, and study fund statements and annual tax documents.
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

name: Migdal Pension
description: Connector for Migdal Insurance (מגדל ביטוח) — pension fund, provident fund, and study fund statements and annual tax documents.
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

name: ESOP Excellence
description: Connector for ESOP Excellence — Israel's leading ESOP management platform. Extracts equity grants (options, RSUs, SARs), vesting schedules, and Section 102 tax documents.
author: OpenConnectors Contributors
